lastReleaseMessage: Full TICA history: multi-season cat search (fixes missing cats like Warrior Princess), deep per-cat history across seasons + kitten/alter eras, and real judge panels from shows.tica.org powering the recommender

milestone.label: v0.16 - Supabase auth + Stripe subscriptions + live TICA data pipeline

items: Favorability recommender: judge-favorability for LIVE upcoming shows is impossible â€” TICA publishes no pre-show judge panels (confirmed 2026-06-30). Reframed honestly: calendar now ranks by cat's home TICA region + soonest, and favorability lights up per show once the user logs its panel. Optional future: import judges from club flyers when available.
Breed line-art generation/harvest (icon system wired; 5 of ~60 breeds live) â€” BLOCKED on a one-time Chrome download grant for midjourney.com (Kane's click)

Multi-user cat sharing SHIPPED + verified working (2026-06-30): owner adds an agent by email; agent gets FULL access (own overlay in their blob), grouped 'Cats I'm an agent for'; leak-critical single-cat extraction unit-tested; super-admin view-as loads the viewed user's agent cats. Remaining: MERGED co-ownership (shared writes both see), email invite notification, reg-number join requests + certificate verification
Auth polish: magic-link / verification edge cases

Security (docs/SECURITY.md): sprint 2026-06-30..07-02 (v0.17.2-0.17.10). DONE: CSP+headers (run_worker_first), rate limits, audit log, prototype-pollution guard, shared-cat payload sanitization, seed-share owner-check, DB advisor lockdown (migration 0006), judge-rating anti-ballot-stuffing, supabase-js confirmed latest, leaked webhook revoked, rotation runbook. **P1-7 DONE + verified live: per-user state migrated to Postgres user_state with RLS (migration 0007); dual-write KV+PG, STATE_READ=pg flag + KV fallback/lazy-backfill; RLS isolation proven (own-row-only/anon-denied); view-as+sharing stay on KV; cost-neutral (free tier) + cron keep-warm.** **Turnstile widget CREATED + site key wired + deployed (v0.17.12, 2026-07-02): managed-mode widget for ring.yesandeverything.com, TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY var live, /api/config serves it, CSP opens challenges.cloudflare.com, login renders widget + passes captchaToken; verified turnstile.render() accepts the key on the live hostname.** OPEN: full relational cats/shows normalization (optional product-scale), move view-as/sharing reads to DEFINER RPCs. KANE ACTIONS: recreate Ring Resources Bot webhook; paste the Turnstile SECRET key (Cloudflare -> Turnstile -> widget -> Secret key) into Supabase -> Authentication -> Attack protection -> enable CAPTCHA (provider Turnstile) to flip bot protection ENFORCING (widget renders now but Supabase ignores the token until the secret is set)
